During the past month The Press
has printed enough facts about the
rottenness of the police departs
ment to convince any fair MINCED
person that the system is wrong.
And yet the committee has ignored
everything, and has gone it's own
sweet way, whitewashing every
thing in sight. When a member of
the committee publicly states that
81 believe that affidavits which
were printed, presumed to have
been made by persons once in Jail,
did not exist" he, to speak plainly,
lies. All he had to do was to have
asked The Press for the facts, and
they would have been given him.


Now, this newspaper never makes
1t rule to enter newspaper con-
troversy, but when other papers
knowingly and with the intention to
try to convey wrong opinion to
the people, and emphasize it to
block Improvement of municipal
conditions, The Press has no hesit-
ancy in speaking right out. for the
good of the city. The other news
papers have repeatedly stated that
the present police investigation is
inspired by the I. w. w. This is
absolutely an untruth, and the !. W.
w. has no more to do with it than
the Methodist college at Rome, the
deposed sultan. Abdul Hamid, or
the benighted Hindus. The presen mt
investigation was started by men,
bers of the woman's club, by labor
unions and by this newspaper.


1t has not only been started, but
it is going to be carried on until
the police department has been
cIeansed, in spite of legion Of
SNUG whtewashing committees,
protecting mayors and the whole
rotten and organized political ring.
And, moreover. The Press offers
other papers fee bit of advice, in
suggesting that they no longer try to
ring in the name of the |. w. W.,
and thus attempt to block the fight
for decency and the appointment of
three police matrons.


The fight has only begun. The
Press will present fact after fact
about conditions in the police de-
partment, and it is absolutely conf
dent that the force of public opinion
will be sufficient to compel action


In sermon last night DR.

clared. Carrie Nation is coming.


That's the sensational minister's
